disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Prolonged unprotected ultraviolet exposure at the beach earlier today, with symptom onset a few hours afterwards
trigger_question_examples: What were you doing before the redness started?
Were you out in the sun today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I was at the beach for hours today and didn't put any sunscreen on. It came up a few hours after I got home.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Redness is confined to sun-exposed skin with a sharp demarcation line at the clothing edge
trigger_question_examples: Is the redness only on the parts that were exposed to the sun?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's only on the parts that weren't covered — my shoulders, upper back and the back of my neck. There's a really clear line where my shirt was.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blistering — the skin is dry and intact, not weeping or peeling
trigger_question_examples: Are there any blisters, or is the skin broken or weeping anywhere?
Has the skin blistered, or is it still dry and intact?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No blisters at all. The skin is dry — it's not broken or weeping, just really red, hot and tight.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'm not sure, I haven't looked that closely.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No systemic heat-illness features — denies confusion, severe headache, nausea/vomiting, fever or rigors
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel confused, have a bad headache, feel sick or have a fever or chills?
Any nausea, vomiting, headache or feeling generally unwell?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, none of that. No headache, I'm not confused, not feeling sick and no fever or chills — it's just the skin.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No dehydration features — passing urine normally, not dizzy on standing, able to drink
trigger_question_examples: Are you passing urine normally and able to drink? Any dizziness when you stand up?
Have you been drinking, and do you feel lightheaded when you get up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah I'm drinking and going to the toilet fine, and I don't get dizzy when I stand up. I just feel hot and sore.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Took paracetamol 1000mg with negligible relief; on no regular medications and no known allergies
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain, and are you on any regular medications or have any allergies?
What have you tried so far for it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took paracetamol, 1000mg, but it barely touched it. I'm not on any regular tablets and I don't have any allergies.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone; pain is preventing sleep and causing significant distress
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone at home with you tonight?
How are you coping — is anyone able to help you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own. The pain's just really getting to me and I can't sleep.
